"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it's important to be mindful of the sources of information you consume. Be cautious of sensational or misleading headlines, and verify the accuracy of any information before sharing it. Additionally, use fact-checking websites and tools to help identify false content. It's also essential to be aware of your own biases and try to seek out multiple perspectives on a given issue. By being an informed and critical consumer of social media content, you can better protect yourself from the negative effects of fake news.",

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it's important to be mindful of the sources of information you consume. Be cautious of sensational or misleading headlines, and verify the accuracy of any information before sharing it. Additionally, use fact-checking websites and tools to help identify false content. It's also essential to be aware of your own biases and try to seek out multiple perspectives on a given issue. By being an informed and critical consumer of social media content, you can better protect yourself from the negative effects of fake news.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it's important to be mindful of the sources of information you consume. Be cautious of sensational or misleading headlines, and verify the accuracy of any information before sharing it. Additionally, use fact-checking websites and tools to help identify false content. It's also essential to be aware of your own biases and try to seek out multiple perspectives on a given issue. By being an informed and critical consumer of social media content, you can better protect yourself from the negative effects of fake news.
